title: Keto-Friendly Creamy Savory Cheese Tartlets
description: A savory and creamy Ukrainian dish featuring ready rolled shortcrust pastry, perfectly suited for a solo dinner or appetizer.
instructions: Place the ready-rolled pastry sheet between two sheets of parchment paper.
Using a small circle cutter or glass, cut out circles from the pastry and place them on a baking tray lined with parchment paper.
In a mixing bowl, combine the heavy cream, Greek yogurt, melted butter, salt, fresh dill, and black pepper. Mix until well combined.
Pour the filling mixture evenly over each tartlet circle.
Place the tartlets in the preheated oven for 15 minutes or until the crust is golden brown.
Allow to cool slightly before serving.
